languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Авгуры{/g} фиксируют необычную аномалию: планету, окруженную огромным поясом астероидов. Опытные пустотники утверждают, что скорее всего ее разорвало приливной силой и предлагают исследовать кольца на предмет полезных ресурсов.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Авгуры{/g} фиксируют необычную аномалию: планету, окруженную огромным поясом астероидов. Опытные пустотники утверждают, что скорее всего ее разорвало приливной силой и предлагают исследовать кольца на предмет полезных ресурсов.

languages.text: The {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} have detected an unusual anomaly: a planet surrounded by a huge asteroid belt. Seasoned voidfarers say that it was most likely torn apart by tidal forces, and they suggest exploring the rings to obtain useful resources.
languages.original_text: {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Авгуры{/g} фиксируют необычную аномалию: планету, окруженную огромным поясом астероидов. Опытные пустотники утверждают, что скорее всего ее разорвало приливной силой и предлагают исследовать кольца на предмет полезных ресурсов.

traits.locale_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} have detected an unusual anomaly: a planet surrounded by a huge asteroid belt. Seasoned voidfarers say that it was most likely torn apart by tidal forces, and they suggest exploring the rings to obtain useful resources.

The augurs have detected an unusual anomaly: a planet surrounded by a huge asteroid belt. Seasoned voidfarers say that it was most likely torn apart by tidal forces, and they suggest exploring the rings to obtain useful resources.

The augurs have detected an unusual anomaly: a planet surrounded by a huge asteroid belt. Seasoned voidfarers say that it was most likely torn apart by tidal forces, and they suggest exploring the rings to obtain useful resources.

languages.text: 予言者たちは、珍しい異常を検知しました。巨大な小惑星帯に囲まれた惑星です。経験豊富な宇宙航海士たちは、この惑星は潮汐力によって破壊された可能性が高いと述べています。そして、この環を探索して有用な資源を得ることを提案しています。
languages.original_text: The augurs have detected an unusual anomaly: a planet surrounded by a huge asteroid belt. Seasoned voidfarers say that it was most likely torn apart by tidal forces, and they suggest exploring the rings to obtain useful resources.

traits.locale_text: 予言者たちは、珍しい異常を検知しました。巨大な小惑星帯に囲まれた惑星です。経験豊富な宇宙航海士たちは、この惑星は潮汐力によって破壊された可能性が高いと述べています。そして、この環を探索して有用な資源を得ることを提案しています。

languages.text: Los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} han detectado una anomalía particularmente extraña: un planeta rodeado por un gran cinturón de asteroides. Los viajeros del vacío más experimentados especulan que podría haber sido desgarrado por fuerzas maremotrices y sugieren buscar recursos útiles en los anillos.
languages.original_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} have detected an unusual anomaly: a planet surrounded by a huge asteroid belt. Seasoned voidfarers say that it was most likely torn apart by tidal forces, and they suggest exploring the rings to obtain useful resources.

traits.locale_text: Los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} han detectado una anomalía particularmente extraña: un planeta rodeado por un gran cinturón de asteroides. Los viajeros del vacío más experimentados especulan que podría haber sido desgarrado por fuerzas maremotrices y sugieren buscar recursos útiles en los anillos.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}侦测到一处异常：一颗被巨型小行星带环绕的行星。老练的虚空旅者推测，它很可能是被潮汐力撕裂的。他们建议勘探星环，以获取可用资源。
languages.original_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} have detected an unusual anomaly: a planet surrounded by a huge asteroid belt. Seasoned voidfarers say that it was most likely torn apart by tidal forces, and they suggest exploring the rings to obtain useful resources.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}侦测到一处异常：一颗被巨型小行星带环绕的行星。老练的虚空旅者推测，它很可能是被潮汐力撕裂的。他们建议勘探星环，以获取可用资源。

languages.text: Die {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} haben eine ungewöhnliche Anomalie entdeckt ... einen von einem riesigen Asteroidengürtel umgebenen Planeten. Erfahrenen Raumfahrern sagen, er wurde vermutlich durch Gezeitenkräfte zerstört und schlagen vor, auf den Ringen nach nützlichen Ressourcen zu suchen.
languages.original_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} have detected an unusual anomaly: a planet surrounded by a huge asteroid belt. Seasoned voidfarers say that it was most likely torn apart by tidal forces, and they suggest exploring the rings to obtain useful resources.

traits.locale_text: Die {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} haben eine ungewöhnliche Anomalie entdeckt ... einen von einem riesigen Asteroidengürtel umgebenen Planeten. Erfahrenen Raumfahrern sagen, er wurde vermutlich durch Gezeitenkräfte zerstört und schlagen vor, auf den Ringen nach nützlichen Ressourcen zu suchen.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Alametler{/g}, sıra dışı bir anomali saptıyor: Devasa bir asteroit kuşağıyla çevrili bir gezegen. Deneyimli gemiciler, gezegenin büyük olasılıkla gelgit kuvvetleri tarafından parçalandığını söylüyor ve yararlı kaynaklar elde etmek için halkaların keşfedilmesini öneriyorlar.
languages.original_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} have detected an unusual anomaly: a planet surrounded by a huge asteroid belt. Seasoned voidfarers say that it was most likely torn apart by tidal forces, and they suggest exploring the rings to obtain useful resources.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Alametler{/g}, sıra dışı bir anomali saptıyor: Devasa bir asteroit kuşağıyla çevrili bir gezegen. Deneyimli gemiciler, gezegenin büyük olasılıkla gelgit kuvvetleri tarafından parçalandığını söylüyor ve yararlı kaynaklar elde etmek için halkaların keşfedilmesini öneriyorlar.

languages.text: Les {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} ont détecté une anomalie : une planète entourée d'une immense ceinture d'astéroïdes. Les voyageurs stellaires chevronnés pensent qu'elle a été victime de la force de marée, et suggèrent d'explorer les anneaux pour en extraire des ressources.
languages.original_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} have detected an unusual anomaly: a planet surrounded by a huge asteroid belt. Seasoned voidfarers say that it was most likely torn apart by tidal forces, and they suggest exploring the rings to obtain useful resources.

traits.locale_text: Les {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} ont détecté une anomalie : une planète entourée d'une immense ceinture d'astéroïdes. Les voyageurs stellaires chevronnés pensent qu'elle a été victime de la force de marée, et suggèrent d'explorer les anneaux pour en extraire des ressources.
